ownership_rule: Same-phase same-hunk overlaps use all-required shared groups. Cross-phase overlaps require pairwise-disjoint AST/JSON key selectors; repeated selectors, semantic aliases for one hunk and unpartitioned ownership fail.

selector_grammar.predicate_registry_contract: each registered predicate id has exactly one checker resolver over base/final AST or structured JSON; unregistered tails and duplicate resolvers fail
selector_grammar.resolution: parse base and final AST/JSON; every selector must resolve nonempty in its declared state, every changed hunk must be covered, non-shared selectors on one path must be disjoint, and duplicate or nonexistent selectors fail
selector_grammar.shared_subgroup: equal nonempty subgroup means every member is required for a hunk matching that selector

parsers: tomllib base-ref merge-base pyproject and uv.lock
semantic_contract.identity: path + dependency anchor + semantic key + transition
semantic_contract.clean_accept: Hatchling absent to exact dev 1.29.0 add and SDK present to absent delete resolve as two disjoint semantic keys on each path
reject_cases: wrong dependency group or runtime dependency leak
lock package missing or version drift
same semantic key claimed by two owners
changed semantic key has no owner
semantic_contract.current_state: RESOLVED/PASS after accepted RED/GREEN/REFACTOR and fresh check_rgr_selectors(repo, scope) semantic revalidation

isolated_install.inputs: only local wheels built in the same transaction

provider_target.install_set: provider workspace dependency closure from same-transaction local wheels

gateway_target.install_set: gateway workspace dependency closure from same-transaction local wheels

standard_backend_scaffold.third_party_policy: current locked project environment may provide third-party dependencies; every OctoAgent workspace module origin must still be under the isolated target
negative_controls: hatchling appears in Provider or Gateway runtime Requires-Dist
lock omits hatchling 1.29.0 or drifts from pyproject
workspace build backend is not hatchling.build
manual wheel, METADATA or RECORD construction is present
installer reads host cache or HOME
source or editable workspace origin leaks into isolated execution
locked scaffold is unavailable but checker reports PASS

existing_clean_wheel_symbol_ast_predeces.mutation_policy: the 32-symbol map identifies the accepted predecessor T011 contract. A reviewed S011 semantic rewrite may change only owned helpers/nodes, immediately supersedes the old direct RED for release use, and requires a fresh main-owned successor RED/binding; the standard-backend exact node/helpers remain unchanged

semantic_contract.file_universe: installed files owned by the evaluated distribution; scanning every Python file in target is forbidden

rules.runtime-required: unconditional module or function-body import outside TYPE_CHECKING, optional ImportError boundary and test-plugin module
rules.optional-lazy: literal import guarded by an executable optional availability or ImportError/ModuleNotFoundError boundary; function-local alone does not imply optional
rules.type-checking: import dominated by if TYPE_CHECKING and not executed at runtime
rules.test-plugin: import in an installed test/plugin module whose entry is explicitly development-only; it never satisfies runtime Requires-Dist
rules.workspace-owned: octoagent import root resolved by the workspace distribution map and additionally classified by its execution context

semantic_contract.preliminary_accept: source manifest equals real wheel METADATA, every occurrence is classified and mapped, current manifest/runtime deltas are emitted exactly, final_verdict is null and final_owner is T070
preliminary_reject: nonliteral dynamic import without a separately resolved executable edge
installed availability substituted for observed import evidence
path or module-name allowlist changes a context result
a target-wide file scan contaminates one distribution with another
a manifest delta is hidden or reported as final PASS

observation_contract.producer: the same external-cwd isolated child that imports installed workspace modules
observation_contract.validation: parent validates child-emitted facts against transaction paths; it may not reconstruct or replace the observation
reject_cases: repo or source checkout appears in child sys.path
host HOME XDG TMP or cache appears in child environment
ambient PYTHONPATH or enabled user-site appears
workspace origin is outside isolated target
required observation field missing or extra
child stdout contains anything except the exact observation object

atomic_evidence.t029_snapshot: base source normalized content/AST + source-to-target projection + target snapshot/verified patch + three exceptions + per-file hashes
atomic_evidence.post_t029: current target symbol changes require stable scope ownership and complete RGR evidence
atomic_evidence.final: source zero + target complete + shim zero + replay T029 snapshot against base; do not compare current target raw hash as relocation truth
negative_oracles: business change embedded at T029 fails
post-T029 target change with owning slice evidence passes
post-T029 target change without owning slice evidence fails

final_contract.optional_lazy: must be owned by a declared extra or an executable fallback
final_contract.type_checking_or_test_plugin: must not create a runtime requirement
final_contract.workspace_owned: must resolve to the owning same-transaction wheel and isolated target origin

overlap_groups.policy: all members required; same task/barrier and same implementation hunk
all members required; same task/barrier and same implementation hunk
all members required; same task/barrier and same implementation hunk

schema.resolved_globs: repository globs expanded with nonzero match or declared-new state
schema.overlap_groups: all overlapping exact paths must have one group or disjoint AST/JSON symbol selectors
schema.owned_test_paths: exact constructor/AgentContext owner test files, never broad test globs
schema.symbol_partitions: cross-phase path ownership by stable AST qualname plus descendant semantic key; selectors must be pairwise disjoint and repeated or aliased hunk ownership fails
schema.dependency_partition_states: structured TOML/lock selectors declare required_absent/required_nonempty per named state and explicit add/delete transitions; resolution compares merge-base/base-ref with the worktree semantic coordinate rather than prefix or line presence
schema.production_edit_budget: exact paths the slice may modify; consumed or forbidden owner slices never transfer their production ownership

self_check.standard_backend_current_semantic_resolv: RESOLVED/PASS: S012-dependency-selector-semantics completed RED/GREEN/REFACTOR and direct check_rgr_selectors(repo, scope) fresh semantic revalidation resolved both dependency paths as ('pre_T012', 'pre_T012')

symbol_partitions.policy: S012 resolves the absent-to-present root dev scaffold delta; S047 resolves the later present-to-absent SDK retirement delta. Each transition owns one disjoint structured key; requiring an absent coordinate as nonempty, an alias, duplicate ownership or a cross-key claim fails.

facts.litellm_proxy_closure_packages: present exactly once as the frozen 30-package set
present exactly once as the frozen 30-package set

symbol_partitions.policy: S012 resolves the uv-generated Hatchling package and transitive closure add delta; S017 owns only the exact 30-package litellm proxy closure deletion at T023; S047 resolves the later SDK lock deletion delta. Manual lock edits, partial or mixed proxy closure state, extra unowned package keys, aliases, inverted states, drift or cross-coordinate claims fail.

T012_target.full_and_all_semantics: CleanWheelArgumentParser.error returns typed CLEAN_WHEEL_PHASE_NOT_READY before any full, startup or source-guard execution

T070_target.full_and_all_semantics: real execution after accepted S070 RGR

symbol_partitions.policy: S011 owns six preliminary command/defer selectors; T012 owns five standard-backend, three import-classification and two child-observation selectors; T070 owns four full/all plus one final dependency-closure selector. All twenty-one are pairwise disjoint; repeated or aliased selectors, inferred child facts, early final closure or missing owning RGR evidence fail.
export names are pairwise disjoint and each changed export must resolve to one owner
source state is atomic; post-T029 function selectors are disjoint and require their own RGR evidence
class selectors are pairwise disjoint; nonexistent or duplicate resolution fails

S007 final-worktree collection, S008 full-contract freshness/outcome and S036 post-snapshot relocation validation own pairwise-disjoint stable functions

stage_negative_fixtures.oracle: Phase2 hunk never requires Phase3/4 slices
Phase3 hunk never requires Phase4 slices; C11 is allowed only after S070-clean-wheel-full evidence is complete
T049 may require C09 and C10 but any C11, gateway full or all execution before T070 fails

S011 six preliminary selectors, S012 five standard-backend selectors and S070 four full/all selectors are pairwise disjoint; any repeated or aliased hunk, early full branch, missing selector or missing owning RGR evidence fails

T012 combined implementation diff may touch exactly repo-scripts/check-runtime-architecture.py plus the three standard-backend paths octoagent/pyproject.toml, octoagent/uv.lock and repo-scripts/check-clean-wheel.py; Provider/Gateway manifests, runtime product code, namespace, guard or startup owner paths fail

prefix-only selector acceptance, absent coordinates required as nonempty, alias/duplicate ownership, wrong group or pin, lock drift, inverted transition or an unowned changed semantic key fails; after resolver REFACTOR fresh semantic revalidation must resolve both dependency paths with unresolved equal to zero

implementation before the fresh S011 successor direct RED and the two new import/child REDs fails; S011 GREEN before standard-backend, import-classification and child-observation GREEN/REFACTOR fails; reusing the superseded root/review/binding fails

missing or drifting Hatchling pin/lock, runtime dependency leakage, non-hatchling backend, manual wheel or METADATA construction, host cache/HOME fallback, source/editable workspace leakage or PASS without an installed locked scaffold fails
omitting any member of a truly shared group fails
a changed path with declared-new status but no slice ownership still fails
a business hunk embedded in the relocation snapshot fails
a target symbol change with owning slice evidence passes
the same target symbol change without owning slice evidence fails
